subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Upon thee be My glory! Thy letter hath reached Us and was read in the presence of this Wronged One. Praise be to God, from it the fragrance of faith was wafted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی علیک بهائی نامه ات رسید و در حضور مظلوم قرائت شد لله الحمد نفحه ایمان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @thankfulness; gratitude
